creator: bugsfreebsd@ttmath.org
text:
I have got a similar problem with my build server, I cannot build lang/rust.

# cd /usr/ports/lang/rust
# make
===>  Building for rust-1.45.2
running: /usr/ports/lang/rust/work/bootstrap/bin/cargo build --manifest-path /usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.45.2-src/src/bootstrap/Cargo.toml --verbose --frozen
error: failed to run `rustc` to learn about target-specific information

Caused by:
  process didn't exit successfully: `/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/bootstrap/bin/rustc - --crate-name ___ --print=file-names -Cdebuginfo=2 -C linker=cc -Wrust_2018_idioms -Wunused_lifetimes -Dwarnings --crate-type bin --crate-type rlib --crate-type dylib --crate-type cdylib --crate-type staticlib --crate-type proc-macro --print=sysroot --print=cfg` (exit code: 101)
--- stderr
thread 'rustc' panicked at 'failed to get current_exe: No such file or directory (os error 2)', src/librustc_session/filesearch.rs:137:23
[...]



# cd /usr/ports/lang/rust/work/bootstrap/bin
# ./rustc -v
thread 'rustc' panicked at 'failed to get current_exe: No such file or directory (os error 2)', src/librustc_session/filesearch.rs:137:23
note: run with `RUST_BACKTRACE=1` environment variable to display a backtrace

error: internal compiler error: unexpected panic

note: the compiler unexpectedly panicked. this is a bug.

note: we would appreciate a bug report: https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#bug-reports

note: rustc 1.44.1 running on x86_64-unknown-freebsd



# truss ./rustc -v
[...]
ioctl(2,TIOCGETA,0x7fffdfff38a0)                 = 0 (0x0)
mmap(0x0,4096,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_ANON,-1,0x0) = 34476838912 (0x806fad000)
__sysctl("kern.proc.pathname.-1",4,0x0,0x7fffdfff3898,0x0,0) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
fstatat(AT_FDCWD,"/usr/share/nls/C/libc.cat",0x7fffdfff34f0,0x0) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
fstatat(AT_FDCWD,"/usr/share/nls/libc/C",0x7fffdfff34f0,0x0) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
fstatat(AT_FDCWD,"/usr/local/share/nls/C/libc.cat",0x7fffdfff34f0,0x0) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
fstatat(AT_FDCWD,"/usr/local/share/nls/libc/C",0x7fffdfff34f0,0x0) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
thread 'write(2,"thread '",8)                            = 8 (0x8)
rustcwrite(2,"rustc",5)                          = 5 (0x5)
' panicked at 'write(2,"' panicked at '",15)                     = 15 (0xf)
failed to get current_exe: No such file or directory (os error 2)write(2,"failed to get current_exe: No su"...,65) = 65 (0x41)
', write(2,"', ",3)                              = 3 (0x3)
src/librustc_session/filesearch.rswrite(2,"src/librustc_session/filesearch."...,34) = 34 (0x22)
:write(2,":",1)                                  = 1 (0x1)
137write(2,"137",3)                              = 3 (0x3)
:write(2,":",1)                                  = 1 (0x1)
23write(2,"23",2)                                        = 2 (0x2)

write(2,"\n",1)                                  = 1 (0x1)
note: run with `RUST_BACKTRACE=1` environment variable to display a backtrace
write(2,"note: run with `RUST_BACKTRACE=1"...,78) = 78 (0x4e)

write(2,"\n",1)                                  = 1 (0x1)
ioctl(2,TIOCGETA,0x7fffdfff32b0)                 = 0 (0x0)
error: internal compiler error: unexpected panic
write(2,"\^[[0m\^[[1m\^[[38;5;9merror: in"...,82) = 82 (0x52)

write(2,"\n",1)                                  = 1 (0x1)
[...]
